items.title: Rank exact same-payoff universe inventory
items.why_it_matters: Profit-speed depends on credible executable exact-payoff candidates, not broad text matches.
success_criteria: Inventory is ranked by exact payoff credibility.
Uncertain pairs stay WATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW.
stop_conditions: Requires trusting title similarity as settlement equivalence.

items.title: Design BTC/Fed exact threshold and meeting-specific pipelines
items.why_it_matters: BTC and Fed broad matching is fake-edge prone until exact source/date/threshold matching exists.
success_criteria: Meeting or threshold scope is explicit.
No evaluator trust is added without Claude review.
stop_conditions: Would rely on broad text matching.

items.title: Keep graph watchlist export diagnostic-only
items.why_it_matters: Graph hints can surface structural questions without creating executable claims.
success_criteria: No graph-to-relative execution path is added.
stop_conditions: Would promote graph hint to paper candidate.

items.title: Research-only SX Bet venue readiness note
items.why_it_matters: New venues may expand breadth, but should pause for Mason when auth/account setup is needed.
items.user_help_needed: Confirm eligibility, data access, and whether any account/API setup is allowed later.
success_criteria: Any credential or account need is written to USER_ACTION_REQUIRED.md.
stop_conditions: Would require live API credentials or account reads.
Would add scraping or execution transport.

items.title: GPT prompter API configuration preflight
items.why_it_matters: Repeated prompter failures from missing or placeholder API credentials prevent safe lane handoff and create noisy recovery loops.
items.user_help_needed: Confirm a valid OpenAI API key is configured through the approved local secret mechanism, without pasting the key into chat or repo files.
success_criteria: Prompter fails fast with clear non-secret diagnostics when API config is missing or placeholder-like.
No secrets are read, printed, committed, or requested in chat.
No live trading, account, order, or auth integration is added.
stop_conditions: Would expose or ask for an API key value.
Would add credential-handling beyond local preflight checks.

items.title: Model parameter compatibility for GPT prompter
items.why_it_matters: Repeated unsupported-parameter failures block GPT handoff even when routing selects a valid model.
success_criteria: Model-specific request parameters are handled conservatively.
Unsupported optional parameters do not cause repeated lane handoff failures.
No secrets, account reads, live trading, or execution behavior is introduced.
stop_conditions: Would add live trading, auth, account, order, or signing logic.
Would mask real API failures as successful handoffs.

items.title: Codex runner invocation and prompt-length hygiene
items.why_it_matters: Relative-value work is blocked when the local Codex wrapper fails before task execution or retries with oversized command arguments.
items.user_help_needed: Confirm the local Codex CLI/wrapper path is usable after runner fixes; do not paste logs manually because outputs should flow through orchestrator log files.
success_criteria: Codex launch no longer passes stray arguments such as `status` to `codex exec`.
Retries avoid command lines that exceed local shell/path limits.
Failures are logged clearly without overwriting task summaries as if work completed.
No live trading, account, order, signing, wallet, or secret-handling behavior is introduced.
stop_conditions: Would require editing .env or exposing credentials.
Would require changing the relative-value task scope to include unrelated orchestrator edits.
Would mask Codex failures as successful task completion.
